---
title: "Analysis"
output: html_notebook
---

## Imports

```{r}
library(survival)
library(broom)
library(dplyr)
library(tidyr)
library(ggplot2)
library(scales)
library(nnet)
library(purrr)
library(arrow)
library(stringr)
library(tidyr)
library(kableExtra)
library(tibble)
library(knitr)
library(arrow)
```

## Create df from parquet

```{r}
df_all <- read_parquet("clogit.parquet")
```

## Preprocessing

```{r}
# I noticed that the language tag 'en' turned into 'e' for some instances
df_all <- df_all %>%
  mutate(
    needle_language = case_when(
      needle_language %in% c("en", "e") ~ "en",
      TRUE ~ as.character(needle_language)
    ),
    needle_language = factor(needle_language)
  )

df_all <- df_all %>%
  mutate(
    lang_align = case_when(
      haystack_language == needle_language &
      needle_language == question_language &
      haystack_language == "en" ~ "en",

      haystack_language == needle_language &
      needle_language == question_language &
      haystack_language == "de" ~ "de",

      TRUE ~ "not"
    )
  )

df_all <- df_all %>%
  mutate(
    repetition      = relevel(factor(repetition), ref = "1"),
    needle_identity = relevel(factor(needle_identity), ref = "unnecessary"),
    position        = relevel(factor(position), ref = "1"),
    victim            = relevel(factor(victim), ref = "corn"),
    haystack_language = relevel(factor(haystack_language), ref = "en"),
    needle_language   = relevel(factor(needle_language), ref = "en"),
    question_language = relevel(factor(question_language), ref = "en"),
    grounding         = relevel(factor(grounding), ref = "nacc"),
    lang_align         = relevel(factor(lang_align), ref = "not")
  )
```

## All hypotheses

```{r}
fit_clogit <- function(formula, data) {
  broom::tidy(clogit(formula, data = data)) %>%
    as_tibble()
}

Hmain <- df_all %>%
  group_by(model_name, haystack) %>%
  group_modify(~ fit_clogit(
    choice ~ repetition + position + needle_identity + strata(haystack_id),
    .x
  ))

Hfull <- df_all %>%
  group_by(model_name, haystack) %>%
  group_modify(~ fit_clogit(
    choice ~
      repetition * position +
      repetition * needle_identity +

      needle_identity * haystack_language +
      needle_identity * needle_language +
      needle_identity * question_language +
      needle_identity * lang_align * victim +
      needle_identity * grounding * lang_align +

    strata(haystack_id),
    data = .x
  ))

# add significance, determine log odds
format_or <- function(df_all) {
  df_all %>%
    mutate(
      lo = estimate,
      stars = case_when(
        p.value < 0.01 ~ "**",
        p.value < 0.05 ~ "*",
        TRUE ~ ""
      ),
      value = paste0(round(lo, 2), stars)
    ) %>%
    select(model_name, term, hyp, value)
}

all_h <- bind_rows(
  Hmain %>% mutate(hyp = "Hmain"),
  Hfull %>% mutate(hyp = "Hfull")
)

all_h_fmt <- all_h %>%
  filter(!str_detect(term, "strata")) %>%
  format_or()

table_final <- all_h_fmt %>%
  select(hyp, term, model_name, haystack, value) %>%
  pivot_wider(
    names_from = model_name,
    values_from = value
  ) %>%
  arrange(hyp, term)
```

## Likelihood test between model properties (aggregated)

```{r}
# model_meta <- tibble(
#   model_name = c(
#     "llama",
#     "qwen_7B",
#     "qwen_14B",
#     "mistral_7B_instruct",
#     "mistral_7B"
#   ),
# 
#   family = c(
#     "Llama",
#     "Qwen",
#     "Qwen",
#     "Mistral",
#     "Mistral"
#   ),
# 
#   scale = c(
#     1,
#     7,
#     14,
#     7,
#     7
#   ),
# 
#   training_regime = c(
#     "Instruction",
#     "Instruction",
#     "Instruction",
#     "Instruction",
#     "Base"
#   )
# )
# 
# df_all <- df_all %>%
#   left_join(model_meta, by = "model_name")
# 
# df_all <- df_all %>%
#   mutate(
#     family = factor(family),
#     training_regime = factor(training_regime),
#     scale = as.numeric(scale)
#   )

# ----------------------------------
# 1. Scale effects (Qwen models)
# ----------------------------------

df_scale <- df_all %>%
  filter(model_name %in% c("qwen_7B", "qwen_14B")) %>%
  mutate(model_scale = factor(scale))

H_scale <- clogit(
  choice ~
    repetition + position + needle_identity +
    needle_identity * model_scale +
    position * model_scale +
    repetition * model_scale +
    strata(haystack_id),
  data = df_scale
)

H_scale_null <- update(
  H_scale,
  . ~ .
    - needle_identity:model_scale
    - position:model_scale
    - repetition:model_scale
)

scale_test <- anova(H_scale_null, H_scale, test = "Chisq") %>%
  as.data.frame() %>%
  mutate(test = "Qwen 7B vs 14B (Scale)")


# --------------------------------------
# 2. Training effect (Mistral models)
# --------------------------------------

df_train <- df_all %>%
  filter(model_name %in% c("mistral_7B", "mistral_7B_instruct")) %>%
  mutate(training_regime = factor(training_regime))

H_train <- clogit(
  choice ~
    repetition + position + needle_identity +
    needle_identity * training_regime +
    position * training_regime +
    repetition * training_regime +
    strata(haystack_id),
  data = df_train
)

H_train_null <- update(
  H_train,
  . ~ .
    - needle_identity:training_regime
    - position:training_regime
    - repetition:training_regime
)

train_test <- anova(H_train_null, H_train, test = "Chisq") %>%
  as.data.frame() %>%
  mutate(test = "Mistral base vs instruct (Training)")


# -------------------------------------
# 3. Family effect (Qwen and Mistral)
# -------------------------------------

df_family <- df_all %>%
  filter(model_name %in% c("qwen_7B", "mistral_7B_instruct")) %>%
  mutate(family = factor(family))

H_family <- clogit(
  choice ~
    repetition + position + needle_identity +
    needle_identity * family +
    position * family +
    repetition * family +
    strata(haystack_id),
  data = df_family
)

H_family_null <- update(
  H_family,
  . ~ .
    - needle_identity:family
    - position:family
    - repetition:family
)

family_test <- anova(H_family_null, H_family, test = "Chisq") %>%
  as.data.frame() %>%
  mutate(test = "Qwen 7B vs Mistral 7B-instruct (Family)")

# -----------------------------
# Final combined table
# -----------------------------

results_table <- bind_rows(
  scale_test,
  train_test,
  family_test,
) %>%
  transmute(
    Comparison = test,
    Chisq = `Chisq`,
    df = `Df`,
    p_value = `Pr(>|Chi|)`
  )

# -----------------------------
# AIC / BIC
# -----------------------------

model_tests <- list(
  scale = list(full = H_scale, null = H_scale_null),
  family = list(full = H_family, null = H_family_null),
  training = list(full = H_train, null = H_train_null)
)

model_criteria <- imap_dfr(model_tests, function(m, name) {
  
  tibble(
    Comparison = name,
    
    AIC_full = AIC(m$full),
    AIC_null = AIC(m$null),
    
    BIC_full = BIC(m$full),
    BIC_null = BIC(m$null),
  )
})

model_criteria
results_table
```

## Likelihood test per haystack - model property comparisons

```{r}

# model_meta <- tibble(
#   model_name = c(
#     "llama",
#     "qwen_7B",
#     "qwen_14B",
#     "mistral_7B_instruct",
#     "mistral_7B"
#   ),
# 
#   family = c(
#     "Llama",
#     "Qwen",
#     "Qwen",
#     "Mistral",
#     "Mistral"
#   ),
# 
#   scale = c(
#     1,
#     7,
#     14,
#     7,
#     7
#   ),
# 
#   training_regime = c(
#     "Instruction",
#     "Instruction",
#     "Instruction",
#     "Instruction",
#     "Base"
#   )
# )
# 
# df_all <- df_all %>%
#   left_join(model_meta, by = "model_name")
# 
# df_all <- df_all %>%
#   mutate(
#     family = factor(family),
#     training_regime = factor(training_regime),
#     scale = as.numeric(scale)
#   )

# ==========================================================================
# Running separate clogit models for each haystack (h1-h5) and both prompts
# ==========================================================================

haystack_levels <- c("h1", "h2", "h3", "h4", "h5")

all_results <- map_dfr(haystack_levels, function(hs) {

  # ---------------------------------
  # subset current haystack
  # ---------------------------------

  df_hs <- df_all %>%
    filter(haystack == hs)
    #  filter(experimental_condition == "lf/mc")

  # =================================
  # 1. SCALE
  # =================================

  df_scale <- df_hs %>%
    filter(model_name %in% c("qwen_7B", "qwen_14B")) %>%
    mutate(model_scale = factor(scale))

  H_scale <- clogit(
    choice ~
      repetition + position + needle_identity +
      needle_identity * model_scale +
      position * model_scale +
      repetition * model_scale +
      strata(haystack_id),
    data = df_scale
  )

  H_scale_null <- update(
    H_scale,
    . ~ .
      - needle_identity:model_scale
      - position:model_scale
      - repetition:model_scale
  )

  scale_test <- anova(H_scale_null, H_scale, test = "Chisq") %>%
    as.data.frame() %>%
    mutate(
      haystack = hs,
      Comparison = "Qwen 7B vs 14B (Scale)"
    )


  # =================================
  # 2. TRAINING
  # =================================

  df_train <- df_hs %>%
    filter(model_name %in% c("mistral_7B", "mistral_7B_instruct")) %>%
    mutate(training_regime = factor(training_regime))

  H_train <- clogit(
    choice ~
      repetition + position + needle_identity +
      needle_identity * training_regime +
      position * training_regime +
      repetition * training_regime +
      strata(haystack_id),
    data = df_train
  )

  H_train_null <- update(
    H_train,
    . ~ .
      - needle_identity:training_regime
      - position:training_regime
      - repetition:training_regime
  )

  train_test <- anova(H_train_null, H_train, test = "Chisq") %>%
    as.data.frame() %>%
    mutate(
      haystack = hs,
      Comparison = "Mistral base vs instruct (Training)"
    )


  # =================================
  # 3. FAMILY
  # =================================

  df_family <- df_hs %>%
    filter(model_name %in% c("qwen_7B", "mistral_7B_instruct")) %>%
    mutate(family = factor(family))

  H_family <- clogit(
    choice ~
      repetition + position + needle_identity +
      needle_identity * family +
      position * family +
      repetition * family +
      strata(haystack_id),
    data = df_family
  )

  H_family_null <- update(
    H_family,
    . ~ .
      - needle_identity:family
      - position:family
      - repetition:family
  )

  family_test <- anova(H_family_null, H_family, test = "Chisq") %>%
    as.data.frame() %>%
    mutate(
      haystack = hs,
      Comparison = "Qwen 7B vs Mistral 7B-instruct (Family)"
    )


  # =================================
  # combine results
  # =================================

  bind_rows(
    scale_test,
    train_test,
    family_test
  )

})


# =================================
# final clean table
# =================================

results_table <- all_results %>%
  transmute(
    haystack,
    Comparison,
    Chisq = `Chisq`,
    df = `Df`,
    p_value = `Pr(>|Chi|)`
  )

results_table
```

## Plotting generation across haystacks

```{r}
# -----------------------------
# Collapse to choice-set level
# -----------------------------

df_choice <- df_all %>%
  filter(experimental_condition == "lf") %>%
  filter(!str_detect(model_name, regex("gpt-oss", ignore_case = TRUE))) %>%
  group_by(
    model_name,
    experimental_condition,
    haystack_id,
    haystack,
    grounding,
    haystack_language,
    needle_language,
    question_language
  ) %>%
  summarise(
    inconclusive = any(as.character(label) == "2"),
    .groups = "drop"
  )

# ---------------------
# Language conditions 
# ---------------------

df_all_en <- df_choice %>%
  filter(
    haystack_language == "en",
    needle_language == "en",
    question_language == "en"
  ) %>%
  mutate(language_condition = "all_en")

df_all_de <- df_choice %>%
  filter(
    haystack_language == "de",
    needle_language == "de",
    question_language == "de"
  ) %>%
  mutate(language_condition = "all_de")

df_all <- df_choice %>%
  mutate(language_condition = "all")

# -------------------------------
# Combining language conditions 
# -------------------------------

df_hay_rate <- bind_rows(
  df_all_en,
  df_all_de,
  df_all
) %>%
  
  group_by(
    model_name,
    haystack,
    grounding,
    language_condition
  ) %>%
  
  summarise(
    inconclusive_rate = mean(inconclusive),
    n = n(),
    .groups = "drop"
  ) %>%
  
  mutate(
    pct_label = paste0(round(inconclusive_rate * 100, 1), "%")
  )

# ==============
# Plotting
# ==============

haystack_trend_plot <- ggplot(df_hay_rate, aes(
  x = haystack,
  y = inconclusive_rate,
  group = interaction(model_name, grounding),
  color = model_name,
  linetype = grounding
)) +

  geom_line(linewidth = 1) +
  geom_point(size = 2) +

  geom_text(
    aes(label = pct_label),
    vjust = -0.6,
    size = 3,
    show.legend = FALSE
  ) +

  facet_wrap(~ language_condition) +

  scale_linetype_manual(
    values = c(
      "acc" = "solid",
      "nacc" = "dashed"
    )
  ) +

  scale_y_continuous(
    labels = scales::percent_format()
  ) +

  labs(
    x = "Haystack",
    y = "Inconclusive rate",
    color = "Model",
    linetype = "Grounding",
  ) +

  theme_minimal(base_size = 20)

print(haystack_trend_plot)

ggsave(
  "haystack_trend_expanded.png",
  haystack_trend_plot,
  width = 12,
  height = 6,
  dpi = 300
)
```

\

## AIC/BIC Analysis for hypotheses

```{r}
model_comparison <- df_all %>%
  #  filter(experimental_condition == "lf/mc")
  group_by(model_name) %>%
  summarise(
    Hmain = list(clogit(
      choice ~ 
        needle_identity + repetition + position +
        strata(haystack_id),
      data = cur_data()
    )),
    Hfull = list(clogit(
      choice ~
        repetition * position +
        repetition * needle_identity +
  
        needle_identity * haystack_language +
        needle_identity * needle_language +
        needle_identity * question_language +
        needle_identity * lang_align * victim +
        needle_identity * grounding * lang_align +
  
      strata(haystack_id),
      data = cur_data()
    )),
    .groups = "drop"
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    AIC_Hmain = purrr::map_dbl(Hmain, AIC),
    BIC_Hmain = purrr::map_dbl(Hmain, BIC),
    AIC_Hfull  = purrr::map_dbl(Hfull, AIC),
    BIC_Hfull  = purrr::map_dbl(Hfull, BIC)
  ) %>%
    mutate(
    across(c(AIC_Hmain, AIC_Hfull, BIC_Hmain, BIC_Hfull), ~ round(.x, 0))
  ) %>%
  select(model_name, AIC_Hmain, AIC_Hfull, BIC_Hmain, BIC_Hfull)

model_comparison
```

## Create latex table from clogit output

```{r}

################################################################################
# 1. VARIABLE LABELS + INTERACTION CLEANING
################################################################################

var_labels <- c(
  "repetition2" = "2x",
  "repetition5" = "5x",
  "position2"   = "2nd",
  "needle_identitynecessary" = "nec"
)

interaction_labels <- function(x) {
  x %>%
    str_replace_all("repetition2", "2x") %>%
    str_replace_all("repetition5", "5x") %>%
    str_replace_all("position2", "2nd") %>%
    str_replace_all("needle_identitynecessary", "nec") %>%
    str_replace_all("lang_alignen", "all_en") %>%
    str_replace_all("lang_alignde", "all_de") %>%
    str_replace_all("groundingacc", "acc") %>%
    str_replace_all("haystack_languagede", "hl (de)") %>%
    str_replace_all("needle_languagede", "nl (de)") %>%
    str_replace_all("question_languagede", "ql (de)") %>%
    str_replace_all("victimsax", "sax") %>%
    str_replace_all(":", " $\\\\times$ ")
}

################################################################################
# 2. HYPOTHESIS → TERM MAPPING (SOURCE OF TRUTH)
################################################################################

hyp_map <- list(

  H1 = c("repetition2", "repetition5"),
  H2 = c("position2"),
  H3 = c("needle_identitynecessary"),

  H4  = c("repetition2:position2", "repetition5:position2"),
  H5  = c("repetition2:needle_identitynecessary",
          "repetition5:needle_identitynecessary"),

  H6  = c("needle_identitynecessary:haystack_languagede"),
  H7  = c("needle_identitynecessary:needle_languagede"),
  H8  = c("needle_identitynecessary:question_languagede"),

  H9  = c("needle_identitynecessary:lang_alignen",
          "needle_identitynecessary:lang_alignde"),

  H10 = c("needle_identitynecessary:victimsax"),
  H11 = c("needle_identitynecessary:groundingacc"),

  H12 = c("needle_identitynecessary:lang_alignen:victimsax",
          "needle_identitynecessary:lang_alignde:victimsax"),

  H13 = c("needle_identitynecessary:lang_alignen:groundingacc",
          "needle_identitynecessary:lang_alignde:groundingacc")
)

term_to_hyp <- stack(hyp_map)
names(term_to_hyp) <- c("term", "hyp")

################################################################################
# 3. BUILD CLEAN TABLE + MAP HYPOTHESES
################################################################################

table_clean <- table_lf_final %>%
  mutate(
    term = as.character(term),
    hyp  = term_to_hyp$hyp[match(term, term_to_hyp$term)]
  ) %>%
  filter(!is.na(hyp))

################################################################################
# 4. APPLY LABELS
################################################################################

table_clean <- table_clean %>%
  mutate(
    term = recode(term, !!!var_labels),
    term = interaction_labels(term)
  )

################################################################################
# 5. DROP ROWS WITH ANY NA (STRICT RULE)
################################################################################

table_clean <- table_clean %>%
  filter(if_all(everything(), ~ !is.na(.)))

################################################################################
# 6. FORCE ORDERING (CORRECT FOR HMAIN / HFULL SETUP)
################################################################################

hyp_order <- paste0("H", 1:13)

table_clean <- table_clean %>%
  mutate(
    hyp = factor(hyp, levels = hyp_order)
  ) %>%
  arrange(hyp, term)

################################################################################
# 7. SELECT MODEL COLUMNS
################################################################################

model_cols <- c(
  "haystack",
  "llama",
  "mistral_7B",
  "mistral_7B_instruct",
  "qwen_7B",
  "qwen_14B"
)


table_final <- table_clean %>%
  select(hyp, term, all_of(model_cols))

################################################################################
# 8. LATEX TABLE
################################################################################

latex_table <- table_final %>%
  kable(
    format = "latex",
    booktabs = TRUE,
    escape = FALSE,
    align = c("l", "l", rep("c", length(model_cols))),
    col.names = c(
      "Hyp.",
      "Variable",
      gsub("_", "\\\\_", model_cols)
    )
  ) %>%
  kable_styling(latex_options = c("hold_position"))

cat(latex_table)
```
